channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census District Geography
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census District Geography This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 11, 2026 Claude for Chrome district-mapping output for the Lewis County FAN-sweep workstream.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Mary Casey Household
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Mary Casey Household This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 11, 2026 Claude for Chrome household check for Mary Casey in the 1870 Lewis County, West Virginia census.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1870 FAN Sweep
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1870 FAN Sweep This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 10, 2026 Claude for Chrome output for the 1870 Lewis County, West Virginia FAN sweep around the Murray Settlement question.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1870 Image Review
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1870 Image Review This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 10, 2026 Claude for Chrome targeted image review for the 1870 Lewis County, West Virginia census, focused on the Battelle and Willey pages identified in the 1870 FAN sweep.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1850 FAN Sweep
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1850 FAN Sweep This note captures the first bounded Claude for Chrome census-neighbor pass for the Murray Settlement question: the 1850 Lewis County, Virginia census.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1860 FAN Sweep
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County 1860 FAN Sweep This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 8, 2026 Claude for Chrome output for the 1860 Lewis County, Virginia FAN sweep around the Murray Settlement question.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County John Murray 1833 Misindex Check
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County John Murray 1833 Misindex Check This note captures the May 8, 2026 Claude for Chrome follow-up on the last remaining direct early John Murray deed lead in Lewis County.

item.title: Thomas Copley May 2026 Email Leads
item.description: Thomas Copley May 2026 Email Leads This note summarizes four May 2026 emails from Thomas Partlow Copley.

item.title: Tom Copley Email - Ballymoe and Ballinasloe Question
item.description: Tom Copley Email - Ballymoe and Ballinasloe Question This page is a browser-readable transcript of a May 2026 email from Thomas Partlow Copley.

item.title: Tom Copley Email - Dolan and Murray
item.description: Tom Copley Email - Dolan and Murray This page is a browser-readable transcript of a May 2026 email from Thomas Partlow Copley.
